title: MicroCutting
description: Craft mini versions of blocks using player heads with new stonecutter recipes
body: # ⚠️ This project is discontinued, since Vanilla Tweaks added this functionality with a bigger set of blocks Get it [here](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/datapacks/) # MicroCutting [](https://github.com/replaceitem) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/microcutting) [](https://discord.gg/etTDQAVSgt) This datapack adds recipes to the stonecutter to craft microblocks inside the stonecutter. By putting a grass block into the stonecutter, you can craft four playerheads with the grass block texture. Credits: * All custom heads are fetched from the [vanillatweaks wandering trader datapack](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/datapacks/).
